posts.author: smarker (Sarah Marker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Just like the option of Move group to top or to another board, add option of Move group to bottom. When you have many groups, dragging can become cumbersome.

What are you trying to achieve

Just like the option of Move group to top or to another board, add option of Move group to bottom. When you have many groups, dragging can become cumbersome.

posts.author: Debbie219Adams (Debbie219Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Adding a “Move group to bottom” option would streamline navigation in boards with many groups. Right now, dragging is cumbersome, and while “Move group to top” or “Move to another board” exist, there’s no quick way to send a group to the end. This feature would mirror the existing options, save time, and improve usability for users managing large boards.
